Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_TUTORIAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}The competition between pharmacies is heating up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16624 1087 0}I've got to make my store more unique, or I'll be sunk.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm doing my best to "pill" in the gaps, so drop by anytime and support my store![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_FILLER_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}I won't bother you with my stories. Take your time and browse.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_FILLER_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Go on, don't be shy! Have a look around![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_SALE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Saturdays are our regular sale days! It's the perfect chance to stock up on supplies![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_TALK_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16623 1087 0}Gosh, is it sweltering. This kind of heat calls for some Aojiru Sorbet![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}...It's a product I tried pushing once, but it didn't sell. Apparently, people only used it for dares...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}But enough of that! Take your time and do some browsin'![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_TALK_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16617 1087 0}My pharmacy's detoxifier is famous! It sucks the poison outta ya like a healing vacuum cleaner.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Girlfriends' pimples, wives' sharp tongues... It can cure anything![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Got anyone around who won't stop naggin' ya? Give it a try on them! Gahahahah![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_TALK_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16608 1087 0}You don't want to become overly reliant on meds. Excess can turn tonics into toxins, ya know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even in an emergency, make sure to follow the instructions on the label, capeesh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, what catches your eye?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_TALK_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16624 1087 0}Vitamins and mineral water are common shopping items these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Things like that used to be taken for granted, but not now. Which helps my business, but it's sad...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's enough of that, though. Take your time and look around![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_TALK_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16617 1087 0}Back in the good ol' days, every household had an aloe plant for their health.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Thanks to that, I've never been constipated in my life! Gahahah![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16628 1087 0}Enough about me, though. Browse to your heart's content![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_TALK_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16623 1087 0}I hear more people have been carrying their meds around in pill cases in case they suddenly get sick.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's good to be prepared, but we have traditions... Don't people remember what an inro is...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Shoot, listen to me lecturin' you like an old-timer. Forget what I said. Have a look around![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_TALK_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16614 1087 0}I got this great concoction from Ken-chan, my wholesaler! They say it enhances... Heheheh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, not that I have anyone to use it on. Huh... I wonder how she's doing these days...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whoa, that's not the type of talk for your ears, is it? Anyway, have a look around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_TALK_07
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16616 1087 0}Back in the good ol' days, every household had an aloe plant for their health.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Thanks to that, I've never been constipated in my life! Gahahah![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Enough about me, though. Browse to your heart's content![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_TALK_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16614 1087 0}I hear more people have been carrying their meds around in pill cases in case they suddenly get sick.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's good to be prepared, but we have traditions... Don't people remember what an inro is...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16609 1087 0}Shoot, listen to me lecturin' you like an old-timer. Forget what I said. Have a look around![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_TALK_09
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16623 1087 0}I got this great concoction from Ken-chan, my wholesaler! They say it enhances... Heheheh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, not that I have anyone to use it on. Huh... I wonder how she's doing these days...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16610 1087 0}Whoa, that's not the type of talk for your ears, is it? Anyway, have a look around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ITEM_GREET_TALK_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16614 1087 0}This area's getting more dangerous. Someone even broke into our storage basement a bit ago.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I bet he had the scare of a lifetime once he saw what was inside! Heheheh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_REQ_AOJIRU_START_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth said that[n]she wanted to try some tasty aojiru...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I might be able to find some here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQ_AOJIRU_START_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16624 1087 0}Oh, sorry, I don't have any for sale right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}I used to, but it didn't sell well and was apparently only used for dares...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16609 1087 0}That said... I did recently come up with a new aojiru creation that I consider my magnum opus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}And maybe I'd be willing to exchange it for the {f 4 4 1 37 1 0} from the antique shop next door...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Haha, I'm joking! That thing's way out of a student's budget.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry, but you'll have to give up on the aojiru. But don't worry, I've got plenty of other fine goods![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQ_AOJIRU_REMIND_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}That {f 4 4 1 37 1 0} from next door would really help streamline things...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}But she probably won't sell it to me... What to do...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whoops, don't mind me. Just talkin' to myself. Take your time and look around![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQ_AOJIRU_END_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}The {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}! How the hell'd you get your hands on this!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQ_AOJIRU_END_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16622 1087 0}Uh, I see... Well, as long as you didn't break any laws, I'm not gonna pry.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16625 1087 0}Anyhow, I'm impressed with your dedication. Well, I won't go back on my word... This is yours![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REQ_AOJIRU_END_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16623 1087 0}If you ever want more, just say the word. This isn't for sale, but I'll make an exception for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, and I'll be making full use of the {f 4 4 1 37 0 0} for my future research.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16606 1087 0}Bottom line, thanks a ton! You take your time lookin' around, now![n]{f 1 1}
